{{CargoRelic
|name=Divination Book
|class_id=22163
|rank=AAA
|affct=FAITH
|birthday=04-12
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.06%), Wishing (0.02%)
|description=On Apr 12, 983 AD, Onmyoji Abbe completed the Divination Book in his dwelling.<br>This strategy book is the only work written by the famous onmyoji, Abbe. It summarizes his experiences as an onmyoji and describes various divination skills in detail. According to history, Abbe seemed to be an exorcist, but in reality, he was equally interested in divination and fortune-telling, as demonstrated by the large record of divination he left behind.
|fame=40
|art=54
|fth=71
|civ=36
|tech=42
|ss1=Demon Minion HP +3%<br>Per 30 Demon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +6
|ss2=Demon Minion HP +4%<br>Per 30 Demon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +8
|ss3=Demon Minion HP +5%<br>Per 30 Demon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +10
|ss4=Demon Minion HP +7%<br>Per 30 Demon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +14
|ss5=Demon Minion HP +9%<br>Per 30 Demon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +18
|ss7=Demon Minion HP +9%<br>Per 30 Demon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +18<br>Per 30 Demon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +14 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Hamster skill II.png|50px]]Place in Hamster Biozilla: In Species War, Troop CRIT DMG +4.5%
|skill2=[[File:Biozilla skill II.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: In Species War, AFFCT Checks -100
}}
